metadata.title: Homepage
metadata.description: Open a specified note, canvas, or workspace on startup, or set it for quick access later.

text:"The plugin required for this homepage type isn't available."

regex.source: text:`This setting has been disabled, as it isn't compatible with Daily Notes' "Open daily note on startup" functionality. To use it, disable the Daily Notes setting.`
regex.target: text:`此设置已被禁用，因为它与每日笔记不兼容' "在启动时打开每日笔记" 功能。要使用它，请禁用“每日笔记”设置`

regex.source: text:"Select commands that will be executed when opening the homepage."
regex.target: text:"选择打开主页时要执行的命令."

regex.source: text:"If this vault is synced using unofficial services, this may lead to content being overwritten."
regex.target: text:"如果使用非官方服务同步此保险库，则可能导致内容被覆盖"

regex.source: text:"Requires Dataview auto-refresh to be enabled."
.setButtonText("Add...")
.setButtonText("Copy debug info")
.setName("Homepage")
.setName("Separate mobile homepage")
.setDesc("For mobile devices, store the homepage and its settings separately.")
regex.target: .setDesc("对于移动设备，单独存储主页及其设置。")

regex.source: .addHeading("Commands","commandsHeading")
.addHeading("Vault environment","vaultHeading")
.addHeading("Opened view","paneHeading")
.addToggle("Open on startup","When launching Obsidian, open the homepage.","openOnStartup",d=>this.display())
regex.target: .addToggle("启动时打开","当obsidian启动时, 打开主页.","openOnStartup",d=>this.display())

regex.source: .addToggle("Open when empty","When there are no tabs open, open the homepage.","openWhenEmpty")
regex.target: .addToggle("为空时打开","当标签页为空时，打开主页.","openWhenEmpty")

regex.source: .addToggle("Use when opening normally","Use homepage settings when opening it normally, such as from a link or the file browser.","alwaysApply")
regex.target: .addToggle("打开时应用设置","当主页正常打开时，应用主页设置，比如从链接或文件管理器打开","alwaysApply")

regex.source: .addDropdown("Opening method","Determine how extant tabs and views are affected on startup."
regex.target: .addDropdown("开启方式","确定启动时现有选项卡和视图如何受到影响。"

regex.source: .addDropdown("Manual opening method","Determine how extant tabs and views are affected when opening with commands or the ribbon button."
regex.target: .addDropdown("确定启动时现有选项卡和视图如何受到影响。","确定使用命令或功能区按钮打开时对现有选项卡和视图的影响。"

regex.source: addDropdown("Homepage view","Choose what view to open the homepage in."
.addToggle("Pin","Pin the homepage when opening."
.addToggle("Hide release notes","Never display release notes when Obsidian updates."
regex.target: .addToggle("隐藏发行说明","黑曜石更新时从不显示发行说明。"

regex.source: .addToggle("Auto-create","When the homepage doesn't exist, create a note with its name."
regex.target: .addToggle("自动创建","当主页不存在时，创建一个带有其名称的注释。"

regex.source: .addToggle("Revert view on close","When navigating away from the homepage, restore the default view."
regex.target: .addToggle("关闭时恢复视图","离开主页时，恢复默认视图。"

regex.source: .addToggle("Auto-scroll","When opening the homepage, scroll to the bottom and focus on the last line."
regex.target: .addToggle("自动滚动","打开主页时，滚动到底部并专注于最后一行。"

regex.source: .addToggle("Refresh Dataview","Always attempt to reload Dataview views when opening the homepage."
regex.target: .addToggle("刷新数据视图","打开主页时，始终尝试重新加载Dataview视图。"
